use_cases: Triggering primary actions in forms and interfaces with configurable visual styles
Navigation triggers and link-like behaviors using the link variant
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
As-child pattern implementation for flexible composition with custom components
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size styling. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), with standard accessibility focus states and disabled handling. The component implements the asChild pattern for composition with custom elements, making it a foundational atomic UI primitive suitable for any design system.
